caveats: inputs.ai_replaceable_share: Supplied 4-digit 5413 mix is engineering-dominated and not representative of 541350.
inputs.ai_replaceable_share: AI reporting product availability is not adoption evidence.
inputs.pi_dist: No inspection-specific pricing pass-through study was found.
inputs.pi_moat: Physical inspection requirement is excluded because it is terminal-demand support, not capture.
inputs.current_adoption_pct: Vendor capability is not market adoption data.
inputs.owners_60plus_pct: Not an inspection-specific owner-age observation.
inputs.owners_60plus_pct.succession_shortage_documented: Do not infer shortage from solo-firm prevalence.
inputs.active_consolidators: Not a documented count of active 541350 consolidators.
inputs.buy_mult: S4 is national generic service SDE, not inspection EBITDA; conversion is judgmental.
inputs.exit_mult: Generic SDE proxy; exit depends on transferable relationships.
inputs.pricing_structure: No national fee schedule was used.

Validator: The AI vendor page substantiates workflow capability, not 25% current adoption, a two-year path to 50%, or inspection-specific pricing pass-through; A and C remain low-confidence estimates.

Validator: The core evidence is residential and the transaction evidence is generic service-business SDE data; commercial/specialty scope, owner age, active consolidators, fee prevalence, and inspection EBITDA multiples are not directly supported.

q.rationale: The existing v3 distribution-retention × moat-retention judgment is reused as a bounded Stage 1 commercial-retention proxy.

leaves.rationale: Predeclared bounded demand/operator row for the inherited v3 terminal class; unknown classes remain missing.

e.rationale: Global eligible-union share; heterogeneous records use the predeclared wider/lower class-count row.

n.detail: margin 0.1565 (margins.json[54]: Damodaran Jan 2026: Business & Consumer Services EBITDA/Sales 15.65%); revenue/employee $146,226 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 541350); class <5: 6,523 firms, avg revenue/firm $193,991 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $30,360 -> out of $1-10M band; class 5-9: 612 firms, avg revenue/firm $827,992 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $129,581 -> out of $1-10M band; class 10-19: 305 firms, avg revenue/firm $1,798,961 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $281,537 -> out of $1-10M band; class 20-99: 143 firms, avg revenue/firm $5,816,294 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $910,250 -> out of $1-10M band; class 100-499: 23 firms, avg revenue/firm $18,547,304 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $2,902,653 -> IN $1-10M band; class 500+: 17 firms, avg revenue/firm $24,508,765 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $3,835,622 -> IN $1-10M band; n_band = 40

s5.rationale: Fixed transform of the disclosed v3 owner-age range into five-year qualifying control-transfer propensity.

a.rationale: AI automates reporting/document workflow but not physical inspection; parent role mix is materially mismatched, so residual is a bounded industry reconstruction.

l.detail: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 541350 ($1,864,147,476) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 541350 ($3,995,784,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: 6-digit. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).

rho.rationale: Fixed outcome-blind transform of the v3 t50 adoption estimate, widened by the declared bridge error.

source_review.summary: Publishable with caveats. Exact mechanics, identities, hashes, deterministic equality, and arithmetic pass. The sources support the physical-inspection floor, AI reporting capability, 25% inspection-contingency waiver statistic, and generic service SDE benchmarks; adoption, capture, owner demographics, consolidator count, fee structure, and EBITDA-equivalent multiples remain disclosed low-confidence proxies.

sources.title: ASHI Standard of Practice
sources.what_it_supports: Defines home inspection as visual examination of accessible systems/components and requires a written report.

sources.title: ReportWriter AI for InterNACHI inspectors
sources.what_it_supports: Shows an AI-oriented inspection reporting product exists; page was reopened but content was not fully retrievable, so it supports capability only.

sources.title: NAR May 2025 Realtors Confidence Index
sources.what_it_supports: Reports that 25% of responding buyers waived the inspection contingency in May 2025.

sources.title: BizBuySell Service Business Valuation Multiples
sources.what_it_supports: Reports 2021-2025 national sold service-business SDE earnings-multiple distribution and caveats on generic comparisons.
